text:
Once upon a time in the sleepy town of Willowbrook, there was a peculiar old tree. It stood at the edge of Cherry Blossom Road. Many kids would come just to get branch decorations. Little Emily liked climbing that tree. Last spring, while she was hanging upside down, she spotted a tiny pink pearl.

Her parents said nothing. She wore it all the time. But one chilly winter evening, looking out her window while snow fell, she saw something strange. Two figures stood close. One big. One small.

She tiptoed outside. The big one hunched over the small one. Sheepish eyes. She whispered.

"I think you want my pearl."

She dropped it. It slid across. They chased. She ran.

Back at her house. Lights off. She peeked through crack.

Two cats.

They meowed.

She giggled. Then giggled sad.

Two days later. Mom slipped pink pearls around their necks. They meowed happily.

They watched
